title: ActuationEventArchetype (GSM v1)
description: EventArchetype specialization for actuation results (Actuator → Sensor). Cybernetic flow step 4: Actuator's Effector emits mutation outcome (ActuationEvent) that the Sensor's Receptor receives as observation input. Base contract for ActuationEventSchema as referenced in GSM: Sensor functional rules, Actuation validation rules. SIE-seeded: one instance per tenant, reused across all Actuations.

schema.description: Must reference the ActuationEvent payload schema (sie://schemas/events/v1/ActuationEvent.json).

x-sie-seed.autoDerivation: Derived by Definition Manager when Rule body contains sys.create/modify/delete/acquire calls. The Actuator's Effector is bound to this archetype.
